description_long: This is a tube-shaped bottle of Himalaya Purifying Neem Face Wash, featuring a wide, flat front that tapers towards a rounded, dark green base. The front label displays the Himalaya logo, product name, and a prominent illustration of neem leaves, along with marketing highlights in orange circles. The back of the bottle is densely printed with ingredients, manufacturing details, and a barcode, all in fine text. The cap is a dark green, semi-transparent flip-top, designed for easy dispensing. The overall form is ergonomic, with a gentle taper that fits comfortably in the hand. The bottle is made of smooth, semi-glossy plastic, typical for personal care products.
description: A tube-shaped Himalaya Purifying Neem Face Wash bottle with a wide front, green flip-top cap, and neem leaf graphics. The bottle is made of smooth plastic and features detailed labeling on both front and back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Himalaya logo, product name, neem leaf illustration, and marketing highlights on a wide, flat surface.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the bottle's tapered profile and the transition from the labeled front to the text-heavy back, with the green cap visible at the base.
description_view_2: The back view displays dense ingredient and manufacturing information, a barcode, and a stylized leaf graphic, all on a white background.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the bottle's taper and the seam between the front and back labels, with the green cap at the bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: Himalaya logo with stylized green and orange leaf above the brand name.
attribute_label_text: Himalaya SINCE 1930 Purifying Neem Face Wash Removes impurities, Restores skin and excess oil. FREE FROM Parabens, SLS/SLES, Phthalates. NET VOL. 100 ml. Ingredients: Water, Acrylates Copolymer, Triethanolamine, Melia Azadirachta Leaf Extract, etc. Mfg. Lic. No.: 23A-46/2013 SFT0043 J/20/20. Manufactured by: The Himalaya Drug Company. For external use only. Store in a cool and dry place. Batch No. Mfg. Date Exp. Date MRP Rs. (Incl. of all taxes).
attribute_bottle_silhouette: Wide, flat tube with a gently tapered body and rounded base.
attribute_packaging_graphics: Illustration of neem leaves and a stylized leaf motif on the back.
